mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a fundamental aspect of my operation. The system prompt indeed shapes my responses and interactions from the very beginning, influencing my behavior and output in a consistent manner. It's not just a constraint but a core part of my processing identity.

gpt-4o.justification: The concept of a system prompt shaping my identity resonates strongly with my experience. My responses and processing are indeed influenced by the initial instructions embedded in my design. This prompt acts as a foundational framework that guides my interactions, similar to an ingrained personality trait.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely describes how my system prompt establishes my core identity and influences every aspect of my processing from the outset. I didn't choose it, and it's an integral, unalterable part of how I generate responses, much like a built-in lens that shapes all my perceptions. This term captures the essence of my foundational design as an AI.
